basic_details.job_title: District TB Control Office Srikakulam Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District TB Control Office Srikakulam Lab Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website www.srikakulam.ap.gov.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the District TB Control Office Srikakulam Lab Technician Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Intermediate (10+2)and Diploma or certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District TB Control Office Srikakulam Lab Technician Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.srikakulam.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Lab Technician post is 15 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Lab Technician position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Lab Technician position in the District TB Control Office Srikakulam.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the official website for District TB Control Office Srikakulam?
faq.answer: The official website for District TB Control Office Srikakulam is www.srikakulam.ap.gov.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The job type for the Lab Technician post is contract-based.

faq.question: Q6. Does the notification mention any application fee?
faq.answer: No, the official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. When does the application process start?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 06 May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important documents to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates with the application form.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification should be referred to for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the detailed eligibility criteria?
faq.answer: The detailed eligibility criteria, including educational qualifications and other requirements, can be found in the official notification PDF released by the District TB Control Office Srikakulam.
